export class ItemOfferPopupParser{constructor(){this._offer=null;}flush(){this._offer=null;return true;}parse(wrapper){const senderId=wrapper.readInt();// 1
const senderName=wrapper.readString();// 2
const itemName=wrapper.readString();// 3
const iconPath=wrapper.readString();// 4
this._offer={senderId,senderName,itemName,iconPath};return true;}get offer(){return this._offer;}}
